## Epic 6 — Combat & Equipment (#77)

**Dependency:** #12
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Write chapter 14 — Social Conflict, adding mechanical depth to social interactions.

### Chapter Structure
1. **Social Interaction Overview** — When to roll, when to roleplay
2. **Social Skills** — Deception, Persuasion, Intimidation, Insight
3. **Influence & Attitude** — NPC disposition system (Hostile → Friendly)
4. **Social Conflict** — Extended social encounters with stakes
5. **Deception & Detection** — Lying, insight, opposed rolls
6. **Reputation** — How your deeds affect social standing
7. **Social Abilities** — Charm person, intimidation talents, etc.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design NPC attitude/influence system
- [ ] Write social skill usage guidelines
- [ ] Design extended social conflict rules
- [ ] Write worked social encounter example
- [ ] Build and fix errors
